# oodle_logmetrics (Data Source)

Lists all log metrics rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "oodle_logmetrics" "all" {}

output "logmetrics" {
  value = data.oodle_logmetrics.all.logmetrics
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `logmetrics` (Attributes List) List of log metrics rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--logmetrics))

<a id="nestedatt--logmetrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `logmetrics`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The ID of the log metrics rule.
- `name` (String) The name of the log metrics rule.
